calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion For Order To Compel Responses
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CELINA GONZALEZ'S Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Responses - To be heard at 9:00am in Department 301 on Line 3 of the Discovery Calendar. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 = (302/JJM)

Defendant Celina Gonzalez' Motion For Order To Compel Responses
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES.

THE PARTIES ARE DEEMED TO HAVE STIPULATED THAT THE MOTION WILL BE DECIDED BY THE PRO TEM JUDGE WITH THE SAME AUTHORITY AS A SUPERIOR COURT JUDGE.

THE COURT ADOPTS HIS TENTATIVE RULING: Defendant Celina Gonzalez' Motion For Order To Compel Responses is GRANTED. Plaintiff's failure to timely respond to the discovery propounded has waived all objections, including objections based upon attorney-client privilege and attorney work product. Plaintiff has not opposed Defendant's motion. Defendant's request for sanctions in the amount of $300.00 is GRANTED. Within ten days of service of notice of entry of this order upon Plaintff: (1) Plaintiff shall provide verified responses without objection and produce all documents responsive Defendant's Inspection Demand (Set One) ; (2) Plaintiff shall provide verified responses without objection to Defendant's Special Interrogatories (Set One); and (3) Plaintiff shall pay Defendant $300.00. SEE WRITTEN ORDER.

JUDGE PRO TEM ERNST HALPERIN, NOT REPORTED.

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Denied
